name: Tom Wayman Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Top sirloin steak, trimmed of all fat and white tissue
3 cups Tomatoes (16 oz including liquid) (I use the cut-up tomatoes)
1/4 cup Chili powder (I use New Mexican chili powder)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large cooking pot, brown meat in the butter or margarine.
2. Pour off 1/3 cup liquid from the meat and sauté green peppers, onions, garlic, and parsley in a separate skillet until tender.
3. Add the sautéed vegetables to the meat mixture and stir in chili powder, salt, pepper, and cumin.
4. Add Tabasco and tomatoes. Simmer the entire mixture covered for 1 hour.
5. Remove the lid and simmer for at least 30 minutes longer, stirring occasionally.
6. Makes 10 servings.
